name: taskagent
description: MCP-native task and plan tracker for AI agent IDEs. Replaces ad-hoc in-session task lists with a durable, multi-agent-safe tracker that persists across sessions, IDEs, and agents.

plugins.name: taskagent-claude
plugins.description: Claude Code + oh-my-claudecode integration. Full parse/decompose/plan/execute pipeline, SessionStart/Stop hooks, and managed CLAUDE.md policy that makes taskagent the default tracker.
